cross_scene_arcs.title: From Neighbors to Romantic Partners
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ashley and Kale's relationship evolves from a friendly first meeting through shifting perceptions and conflicts, leading to a romantic connection that persists despite later intrusions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ashley as a new neighbor establishing rapport with Kale
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ashley in a romantic relationship with Kale, but unsettled by Ronnie's filming
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The violation from Ronnie's silent filming and its potential impact on their relationship

cross_scene_arcs.title: Active Participant in the Giles Investigation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ashley transitions from a skeptical newcomer to an active field operative in the surveillance of Robert Giles, coordinating with Kale, facing internal conflict over the investigation's continuation, and participating in the final lethal confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Skeptic but joining the stakeout after seeing evidence
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Survivor of the fight against Giles, having helped neutralize the threat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: None, as Giles is killed and the immediate danger is resolved

cross_scene_arcs.title: Traumatic Loss and Legal Repercussions
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After escaping a car crash and witnessing his father's death, Kale's trauma leads to an assault on a teacher, resulting in a house arrest sentence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Kale saving his father from the SUV.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Kale sentenced to three months house arrest.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Kale's unresolved grief and potential for further behavioral issues.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Isolation and Voyeuristic Coping
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Under house arrest, Kale experiences frustration from failed entertainment and turns to spying on neighbors as a diversion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Kale under house arrest, attempting to play Xbox.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Kale deliberately watching Ashley through her window.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The risk of discovery or escalation of his spying behavior.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Ashley
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kale's initial voyeuristic interest in Ashley develops into a mutual connection, leading to collaboration in neighbor surveillance and support during a life-threatening encounter.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Kale spying on Ashley from his dad's office.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ashley helping Kale escape from danger.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future dynamics of their relationship after shared trauma.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Investigation and Confrontation with Giles
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Kale's suspicion of Robert Giles leads to the discovery of evidence linking him to murders, culminating in a violent confrontation where Kale and Ashley must flee.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Kale, Ashley, and Ronnie beginning a stakeout of Giles.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Kale fleeing from Giles with Ashley's assistance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Giles will be caught or if Kale remains in danger.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Friendship and Concern for Kale
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ronnie returns from Hawaii, expresses concern over Kale's spying behavior, and encourages Kale to pursue Ashley.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ronnie is a close friend returning from a trip.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ronnie has voiced encouragement for Kale to approach Ashley.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Kale's ongoing obsession with observing neighbors.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Active Investigation into Robert Giles
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ronnie spies on Ashley, confirms Giles as a suspect, takes protective action by securing the garage remote, and retrieves the alarm code from Giles' car.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ronnie is alarmed after alerting Ashley during surveillance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ronnie has obtained Giles' garage code while trespassing on his property.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the plan to access Giles' garage is safe and justified.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Peril and Survival in the Giles Confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ronnie signals for help during a break-in, survives by hiding and pranking Kale, is later attacked by Giles, and recovers with a head injury while intrusively filming.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ronnie is in immediate physical danger after alerting surveillance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ronnie is alive with a head injury, silently filming Kale and Ashley.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ronnie's motives for filming and the extent of his head injury.
